name: waveform-scrubber
title: Waveform Scrubber
author: Parable
description: A seekable audio-waveform scrubber on canvas: deterministic seeded peaks (or your own peak data), a simulated transport with play/pause and elapsed/total readouts, pointer-capture drag seeking, and full keyboard control on a role="slider" surface. Under prefers-reduced-motion the animation loop is disabled and the playhead steps once per second.
